summary: Iteration 85 - Comprehensive testing of bug fixes, Discovery Call workflow, and Liquid Glass design system. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: glass-header, glass-card, glass-modal classes applied correctly, Fine Art/Illustration service types available, single footer in Client Portal.
critical_code_review_comments: All glass CSS classes (glass-header, glass-card, glass-modal) are properly defined in index.css
Text contrast colors updated: text-secondary=#4B5563, text-tertiary=#6B7280
Discovery Call workflow backend endpoint PATCH /api/leads/:id/discovery-call working correctly
Fine Art and Illustration service types available in inquiry form and lead creation
Client Portal has single 'Powered by KOLOR STUDIO' footer (no duplicates)
Google Calendar config-check endpoint returns proper configuration status
seed_data_creation: Test leads created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database was reset. Test user bookingtest@test.com exists with one lead (Jane Smith - Wedding Shoot). All bug fixes verified: Google Calendar config-check, email verification errors, Fine Art category, single footer. Discovery Call workflow tested via API. Liquid Glass design verified via UI - glass-header on dashboard header, glass-card on stat cards, glass-modal on modals.

BUG_1_Google_Calendar.details: config-check endpoint returns configured status with details (hasClientId, hasClientSecret, hasRedirectUri)

BUG_2_Email_Verification.details: verify-email endpoint returns proper error messages for invalid/expired/short tokens

BUG_5_Fine_Art_Category.details: FINE_ART and ILLUSTRATION options available in inquiry form service type dropdown

BUG_6_Footer_Duplicate.details: Client Portal has single 'Powered by KOLOR STUDIO' footer

Discovery_Call_Backend.details: PATCH /api/leads/:id/discovery-call endpoint works - can schedule and complete calls with notes

Discovery_Call_UI.details: LeadDetailModal has Discovery Call card with 3 states (schedule/complete/send quote) for leads with status NEW/REVIEWING/CONTACTED/QUALIFIED

Glass_Design_Header.details: Dashboard header has glass-header class (verified via Playwright)

Glass_Design_Cards.details: 5 elements with glass-card class found on dashboard (stat cards + toolbar)

Glass_Design_Modals.details: SettingsModal has glass-modal class (verified via Playwright). AddLeadModal and LeadDetailModal have glass-modal in code.

Text_Contrast.details: tailwind.config.js has text-secondary=#4B5563 and text-tertiary=#6B7280 (darker colors)

Calendar_Widget.details: CalendarConnectionWidget visible on dashboard with Connect Calendar button and 3 benefit checkmarks
